Opcode.name: PCM_OP_COLLECTIONS_REVOKE_PROMISE_TO_PAY
Opcode.Doc: Revoke/cancel promise to pay for a billinfo.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: The activity event poid that holds promise to pay information

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_SCENARIO_OBJ
Poid.Doc: The collections scenario poid for which promise to pay is revoked

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: The promise to pay activity event poid

Enum.name: PIN_FLD_RESULT
Enum.Doc:
Result of the operation (pass or fail). The values can be:
1: Pass (value:PIN_RESULT_PASS).
0: Failed (value:PIN_RESULT_FAIL).

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.
